picks.quote: I picked the wrong guy... Gaethje beat his own England, so to speak, in beating, well, a guy who up to this point was the boogeyman.
I thought that the mental side would be the difference. That Pereira would be mentally strong... I had it wrong... Gane finished him.
And in the end, you're right. My report was right. I I picked the under... Bam Rodriguez... he took him out.
